title: Mission to the Rainbow Planet Vupiter Wupiter Snupiter
summary: Mickey, Minnie, and Mole join Captain Izzy on a daring interstellar mission to reunite a baby space rock named Moueks with its family. After blasting off from Earth with a cargo of essentials like flashlights and dinosaurs, the crew navigates the deep dark of space. They successfully rescue Moueks' father using a robotic arm and set a course for the vibrant Rainbow Planet Vupiter Wupiter Snupiter. Guided by a magical rope to ensure their return, they navigate through swirling colorful clouds to deliver the space rock family home before safely touching down back on Earth.

highlightQuote.text: I trapped the stories in a bucket and I put a big lid on it and I shut it with some glue and honey.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, okay.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: You don't want to make the new rug wet.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: True. All right, let me set up the stars and turn off the light.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, here, I'll lie down on the new rug with you. Are you ready for stars and stories?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Once upon a time, Mickey and Minnie and Mole decided to go on a space mission.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Can I get my flashlight? Since it's so dark in space, you can't see a thing.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: It's very important to have a flashlight, you're right. And Mickey and Minnie and Mole on this particular day were going on a space mission because they needed to help their friend who was a baby space rock.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I got everything we need up on the shelf. Flashlights and pictures and clothes and pipe cleaners and dinosaurs and elephants and even Charlotte and pictures and cameras in this bin.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well, that's good. And there's a Band-Aid thing right in there. And Mickey said, 'Captain Izzy, will you come with us on our space mission?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Uh-huh.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well, thank you, because we need your help. Look, here's this baby space rock. What was the baby space rock's name?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Moueks.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Moueks. And Moueks here is very upset. Tell her, Moueks.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: [Coughing and crying sounds]

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Moueks, you sound a little sick, are you okay? And Mole said, 'I think Moueks is just a little homesick. But we don't know where Moueks is from.'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: There's my dada. He's staying out my dinner.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, Moueks, your dada rock is out there in space? Should we take you up there to him?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, he's right there in that space. And now, let's go there to my dad.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, your dada rock is right here on Earth?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, he's not, he's in this special space with all of these stars.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, okay, well we better blast off so we can bring you to him. 'Is everyone ready?' said Mickey. 'You do the countdown, Captain Izzy.'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: One, two, three, four, five, six, seven, eight, nine, ten, eleven, twelve!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Boom! And so the rocket ship blasted off. They went so fast straight up into the air until they were up floating amongst the stars.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And all of the stars and the stories we tell yesterday, I think those were tickles because they followed me every day. They followed me into my bed at night.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: What tickled you?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: The stories. They followed me into my bed one time and I tried to block them away, but they didn't go.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: What was that like?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: That was like I had to trap them. I trapped the stories in a bucket and I put a big lid on it and I shut it with some glue and honey.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Yeah?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And then my dad use Googoo the bird and she was looking for the stories but she found no stories.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Wow. So what did she do?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I don't know. But you can keep telling the story that we are telling.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, okay. Does anyone need anything from in the ship?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Well, it's very dark out here in space and there's lots of little rocks floating around. There he is! He's right here, he's blowing towards our spaceship.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, Captain Izzy, good thing you found him. Okay, we have to bring him aboard using the robot arm.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Boop!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, you got it. Okay, bring that space rock onto our ship. Now Moueks, is that your dada?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yes! Yeah, but how do we find Moueks' home?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, we have to bring Moueks back to her home with her dada.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And her mama! I got the space computer, I was working with it.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, okay. What are you going to do with that, Captain Izzy?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Dada, I had a bit more pee.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, that's good. But you're in a diaper now, so that's okay.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And my diaper caught the pee!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: That's very good. Well, where do they live out here in space?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They lived on the Rainbow Planet Vupiter Wupiter Snupiter.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: The Rainbow Planet Vupiter Wupiter Snupiter! Well, we better go there. Can you punch the commands into that space computer?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Beep boop!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And so we fire our rocket engines. There it is, a tiny glowing speck, a planet that's covered with swirling colors.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: This rope will help us find our way back to Earth.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, good idea. We'll use that rope to help us find our way home.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: As the Rainbow Planet Vupiter Wupiter Snupiter gets closer, we can see red and orange and yellow and green and purple swirls all over.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Dada, I really think we should find our way back to Earth with this rope.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, let's drop off our space rocks on their planet. Bye-bye, space rocks! Now we can turn our ship around and use our rope to find our way back home.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Beep boop!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And the rockets fired. Oh, there's the Earth. Let's come in for a landing. We landed safely back home on Earth.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: With stars and stories. Can I do a bit of shadow puppet?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay. Who is that one, a bunny?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Oh look at that bird. Flap flap flap. That's not a flapping bird, that's a shark.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, a shark, I like it. Hi, hand creature, can I give you a kiss?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: That's enough.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, turn on the light.

characters.name: Mickey
characters.description: One of Mistress Mouse’s storied stuffy mice, this famous plush adventurer is a visionary benefactor who manifests fragrant blooms from magic Legos and pilots his Mousecar through lightless depths. Whether arming moles for Kitty’s investigations or securing solutions for Frasgle, he remains fiercely loyal to Minnie, Mole, Izzy, and Hattie. Accompanied by a cheerful infant and shadowed by a friend’s disappearance, his haste to reach the spires of Peacock’s castle has left him without essential provisions, miring him in a sudden, hungry peril.

characters.name: Minnie
characters.description: A wise veteran of briny depths and interstellar frontiers, Mickey’s resourceful mouse companion and confidant to the Princess of Mouseland guides Izzy and Hattie with a glowing lantern and ingenious Mystery Mousketools. Having recently breathed life into a towering guardian of interlocking bricks, this intrepid traveler now points the way toward the mountain’s peak, pausing to investigate the savory aroma of bacon-scented mushrooms while serving as a compassionate friend whose seasoned instincts help decipher Frasgle’s complex roars and sounds.

characters.name: Mole
characters.description: A resourceful, perpetually humming mole with an impossibly long name, this polite and intrepid mariner serves as a bridge between worlds, translating Frasgle’s unique tongue and guiding the way to the hidden Underground Library. Whether managing rocket controls with wide-eyed curiosity, unraveling treehouse mysteries, or sharing the magic of special Legos, he encourages his companions to embrace the unknown between tending his dandelion yard and baking fragrant banana bread. A lover of both wriggly worms and sweet blueberries, he sings whimsical songs of carnabee sharks and drives a noisy dark brown car, remaining firmly hesitant about boarding giant robots even as he coaxes his friends toward bold new adventures.

characters.name: Captain Izzy
characters.description: A determined space explorer and brilliant researcher, this confident commander leads her mission into the stars with absolute authority. A master pilot of both spacecraft and deep-sea submersibles, she navigates glittering heavens and crushing depths with unerring precision. Her tireless quest to collect alien artifacts remains fueled by a singular, inquisitive goal: finding playmates across the universe.

characters.name: Moueks
characters.description: A baby space rock who is homesick and looking for its family.

characters.name: Dada Space Rock
characters.description: Moueks' father, who is rescued from floating in deep space.

characters.name: Mama Space Rock
characters.description: A member of the space rock family residing on the Rainbow Planet.

characters.name: Googoo
characters.description: A bird who searches for missing stories.

places.name: Earth
places.description: The ancestral cradle of humanity and the definitive anchor for the galactic mission, this rocky world pulses with a hidden molten core. As the home planet where the journey begins and ends, it serves as the foundational site for the Floofers’ true home and new school, bridging an ancient legacy with the education of a new generation.

places.name: Outer Space
places.description: The vast, dark expanse beyond Earth’s atmosphere, a silent cradle for shooting stars where Mickey and Minnie journey to witness the celestial glow while the crew scours the void for lost rocks and wandering stars.

places.name: Rainbow Planet Vupiter Wupiter Snupiter
places.description: A vibrant planet covered in swirling colors of red, orange, yellow, green, and purple.
